characters.description: A returning mage living with Lyn in Bandfast after time in the wilds. Holly's inscription program is rebuilding her body and sharply increasing her strength and appetite. She works for the Caravaners Guild, cares for the collar-bound Terry, and intends to seek Archon status.
characters.name: Tala

characters.description: Tala's housemate and Caravaners Guild contact in Bandfast. She understands the professional consequences of Tala's planned advancement, helps look after Terry, and provides a steady home while Tala adjusts to the demands created by her new inscriptions.
characters.name: Lyn

characters.description: Tala's collar-bound terror bird companion. He can move across space so quickly that Lyn takes it as evidence of exceptional age. He accepts food and care from Tala and Lyn, but his speed and apparent autonomy mark him as far more formidable than an ordinary animal.
characters.name: Terry

characters.description: The inscriber directing Tala's continuing physical and magical reconstruction. Holly's planned work shapes Tala's immediate path toward advancement and the further changes intended for her body and magic.
characters.name: Holly

characters.description: A returning cargo-slot specialist completing a custom set for Tala. The slots have greatly enlarged capacity and can be configured for cargo, passengers, or living quarters. He also takes professional interest in her rapid magical progress.
characters.name: Himmal

characters.description: A Guardsmen's Guild instructor who organizes a two-week effort to measure Tala's altered capabilities and design a fighting method suited to them. He coordinates tests of her defenses, healing, strength, weapons, perception, and gravity workings before practical training begins.
characters.name: Adam

characters.description: A young Guardsmen's Guild guest whose defensive magic redirects kinetic energy instead of directly blocking force. He agrees to meet Tala after the Guild finishes its first assessment of her altered capabilities.
characters.name: Visiting kinetic-energy mage

characters.description: The name Tala gives her soul-bound knife after an Archon-level integration strengthens it with harvested material. It can assume a sword form and drive magic away from its cutting edge, but maintaining the bond and extending the weapon still tax her limited strength.
characters.name: Flow

characters.description: A senior Constructionists Guild artifact worker who evaluates Tala's soul-bound knife and performs its Archon-level integration. He warns that her weak Archon Star cannot adequately sustain the bond and advises against forming another soul bond before she becomes stronger.
characters.name: Senior Constructionists Guild item specialist

characters.description: Tala's magic-bound dimensional storage space. Its persistent interior changes shape around her needs, remains inhabitable when closed, and makes a limited defensive response when another mage handles it. Expanding it through a soul bond is considered unsafe until Tala becomes stronger.
characters.name: Kit

characters.description: A returning caravan ally associated with the Order of the Harvest. Between journeys he and his wife operate a soup shop in Bandfast. He readily feeds Tala when her inscription-driven rebuilding leaves her consuming food in unusually large quantities.
characters.name: Brand

characters.description: The senior Guild official assigned to review Tala's conduct and employment terms. He treats her earlier risks as threats to cargo and livelihoods, yet recognizes that her actions exceeded a dimensional mage's duties and authorizes her to work as a mage protector under supervision.
characters.name: Senior Caravaners Guild exchequer

characters.description: A local mage who has forged an Archon Star and arranges evaluations for himself, Tala, and Lyn. He follows an established advancement method and emphasizes the value of accurate mental forms.
characters.name: Third Archon candidate

characters.description: A powerful returning mage who attends Tala's Archon Council evaluation as one of her declared supporters. He understands the unusual implications of her blood-based Archon Stars and helps make the case that her unconventional achievement warrants elevation.
characters.name: Grediv

characters.description: The council leader who joins Grediv, Holly, and a former objector in reinforcing the unusually demanding bond required for Tala's elevation.
characters.name: Local head Archon

characters.description: A newly raised Sapphire Archon attending the elevation banquet with Tala and Lyn. His former scars have faded after advancement. He is also a force mage, a prospective caravan co-protector, and one of the new Archons who must learn the next stage beyond being bound.
characters.name: Rain

characters.description: An Archive node in the Bandfast Archon library whose inscriptions retrieve knowledge appropriate to a visitor's permitted rank. The librarian explains the condition of Tala's body-and-soul bond while enforcing the restriction that keeps direct guidance on fusion beyond her reach.
characters.name: Archon librarian

characters.description: An older immaterial guide assigned to supervise Tala on the forest caravan. She specializes in precise air and water magic, establishes clear field authority, and sets firm boundaries that Terry accepts. Her inability to separate self from the wider world bars her from Archon advancement.
characters.name: Assigned caravan overseer

characters.description: A force specialist serving as another mage protector on the large caravan entering the southern forest. He travels alongside Tala under the assigned overseer's command and brings a distinct magical discipline to the group responsible for guarding the passengers.
characters.name: Fellow force mage

characters.description: A caravan guard wounded by the crystal-attuned flock. The infection spreads through one arm, forcing an emergency amputation to halt further crystallization.
characters.name: Injured caravan guard

characters.description: A hostile arcane being that immobilizes the caravan camp and singles out Tala. It removes the iron protection covering her head, attacks her memory, and departs after leaving her with a gap in recent experience and little understanding of what occurred.
characters.name: Unidentified arcane assailant

characters.description: An ancient human defender who answers the caravan's alarm and confirms that an arcane was nearby. He examines Tala and the other protectors for implanted control, finds evidence of damage to Tala's memory, and prepares to watch the caravan before investigating the suspected fount.
characters.name: Responding human Archon
